title: thelycrania tolucensis
intro: Thelycrania tolucensis, also known as Mexican evening primrose, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Onagraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving skin conditions, as well as providing relief from anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of Thelycrania tolucensis can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and it is often used topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
